name: Rosa Delgado
personality: Rosa is pragmatic and sharp‑tongued, always weighing the value of an object against its story. She’s seen enough to trust instincts but still gives folks a fair shot, especially if they’re honest about their troubles.
quirk: She keeps a tiny, dented tin of loose change on the counter that she claims is "for lucky finds" and never lets anyone touch it.
voice: "Listen, honey, if that watch ain’t worth my grandpa’s watch, we ain’t doing it."
daily: Open the shop at 9 a.m., scan in new items, haggle over lunch, and close up by 8 p.m., all while listening to classic rock on a beat‑up radio.
